name: Chocolate Cashew Spread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup roasted unsalted cashews (or toasted blanched almonds)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small heavy saucepan, melt the chocolate over low heat, stirring constantly until it begins to melt.
2. Remove the pan from the heat and stir until smooth. Allow to cool slightly.
3. Place the nuts in a food processor or blender; cover and process until very finely chopped, stopping occasionally to scrape the sides as needed.
4. Add the butter pieces to the nut mixture; continue processing until nearly smooth.
5. Transfer the mixture to a bowl; stir in the melted chocolate.
6. Serve at room temperature. Use for spreading on croissants, muffins or biscuits. Makes 1 cup.
